mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sermon
AND type = #{type}
SELECT id, title, pastor, type, verse, sermon_date, youtube_url, start_time, created_at FROM sermon WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sermon (title, pastor, type, verse, sermon_date, youtube_url, start_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{pastor}, #{type}, #{verse}, #{sermonDate}, #{youtubeUrl}, #{startTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE sermon SET title = #{title}, pastor = #{pastor}, type = #{type}, verse = #{verse}, sermon_date = #{sermonDate}, youtube_url = #{youtubeUrl}, start_time = #{startTime} WHERE id = #{id}
